name: Azelaic Acid
description: A dicarboxylic acid that targets rosacea, acne, and hyperpigmentation.
scientificSummary: Inhibits tyrosinase (pigment production) and has strong antibacterial properties against acne-causing bacteria.
mechanismOfAction: Inhibits tyrosinase (pigment production) and has strong antibacterial properties against acne-causing bacteria.

seo.description: Discover the scientific benefits, compatibility, and clinical profile of Azelaic Acid in skincare.
